key.name: capture-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut used to start Quickshot Linux selection.

key.name: save-directory
key.description: Directory where Ctrl+S stores annotated screenshots.

key.name: default-color
key.description: Initial color used by annotation tools.

key.name: stroke-width
key.description: Default width for pen, line, arrow, and rectangle tools.

key.name: highlighter-width
key.description: Default width for the highlighter tool.
